title: What’s Coming to Disney+ in July 2026
content:
ByArushi Jacob

Disney+is heading into July with a packed lineup of premieres, returning favorites and major live sports.

July kicks off with “Disney Celebrates America,” a 24-hour special in honor of the Fourth of July. ESPN broadcasts begin early, including Wimbledon games and, later in the month, WNBA games.

On the entertainment side, new and returning titles arrive across Disney+ and Hulu, with highlights like Season 2 of “Adults,” a livestream of Lollapalooza, and “Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro” available for streaming.

Take a look at Disney+’s full July slate below, and sign up for aDisney+ account here.

July 1“Abandoned” (Hulu Original) – Premiere“King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original)“Magicampers” (Season 1)“X-Men ’97” (Season 2) (Disney+ Original) – Three-Episode Premiere“Wimbledon Second Round” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Match Point” (ESPN)“Women’s College World Series Championship Game 1” (ESPN)

July 2“Undead Unluck: Winter Arc” (Hulu Original) – Special Premiere“PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 1” (ESPN+)“Wimbledon Second Round” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Match Point” (ESPN)

July 3“Disney Celebrates America” (ABC News Live) – 24-hour programming begins“The Simpsons: Simpsley” – Disney+ Exclusive Episode“PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 2” (ESPN+)“Wimbledon Third Round” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Match Point” (ESPN)

July 4“Disney Celebrates America” (ABC News Live)“PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 3” (ESPN+)“Wimbledon Third Round” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Nathan’s Famous Hot Dog Eating Contest – Women’s” (ESPN+)“Nathan’s Famous Hot Dog Eating Contest – Men’s” (ESPN2)“Wimbledon Match Point” (ESPN)

July 5“Chibiverse” (Season 4)“SHARKFEST” – New Premieres for the Annual Summer Event“Hammerhead Sharks Up Close with Bertie Gregory”“World’s Biggest Mako”“Attack of the Samurai Sharks”“Shark vs. Giant Croc”“Shark Island Showdown”“Sharks: Reef Rivals”“Great White Gauntlet”“PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 4” (ESPN+)“Wimbledon Round of 16” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“NWSL: Boston Legacy vs. Bay FC” (ESPN)“Wimbledon Round of 16” (ABC)“Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA Countdown” (ESPN)“Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA: Indiana Fever vs. Las Vegas Aces” (ESPN)

July 6“Doctor on the Edge” (Hulu Original)“Wimbledon Round of 16 No. 1 Court & Outer Courts”(ESPN2, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Round of 16 Centre Court” (ESPN)

July 7“Doctor on the Edge” (Hulu Original) – Season Finale“Wimbledon Quarterfinals Centre Court” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Quarterfinals No. 1 Court”(ESPN2)“WNBA: Dallas Wings vs. New York Liberty” (ESPN)

July 8“Bluey Compilations” – Premiere“King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original)“X-Men ’97” (Season 2) (Disney+ Original)“Wimbledon Quarterfinals Centre Court” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Quarterfinals No. 1 Court” (ESPN2)

July 9“PGA TOUR: Genesis Scottish Open Day 1” (ESPN+)“Breakfast at Wimbledon” (ESPN)“Wimbledon Ladies’ Semifinals” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Wimbledon Mixed Doubles Championship” (ESPN)

July 10“Project Runway” (Season 22) – Premiere“PGA TOUR: Genesis Scottish Open Day 2” (ESPN+)“Breakfast at Wimbledon” (ESPN)“Wimbledon Gentlemen’s Semifinals” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)

July 11“Theme Song Takeover” (Season 6) – Premiere“PGA TOUR: Genesis Scottish Open Day 3” (ESPN+)“Wimbledon Gentlemen’s Doubles Championship” (ESPN)“Breakfast at Wimbledon” (ESPN)“Wimbledon Ladies’ Championship” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“WNBA: New York Liberty vs. Minnesota Lynx” (ABC)

July 12“PGA TOUR: Genesis Scottish Open Day 4” (ESPN+)“Wimbledon Ladies’ Doubles Championship” (ESPN)“Breakfast at Wimbledon” (ESPN)“Wimbledon Gentlemen’s Championship” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“NWSL: Seattle Reign vs. Portland Thorns” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)“Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA Countdown” (ESPN)“Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA: Chicago Sky vs. Dallas Wings” (ESPN)

July 13“Rabbit Hole” (Season 1) (Pocketwatch)

July 14“Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro” – Premiere“Marvel’s Spidey and his Amazing Friends” (Season 5)

July 15“King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original)“Mission: Yozakura Family” (Season 2) (Hulu Original)“X-Men ’97” (Season 2) (Disney+ Original)“The 2026 ESPYS Presented by Capital One” (ABC, ESPN+)

July 16“The 2026 ESPYS Presented by Capital One”“New York Mets vs. Philadelphia Phillies” (ESPN)

July 17“America’s Funniest Home Videos” (Seasons 19-21)“Descendants: Wicked Wonderland” – Premiere“Project Runway” (Season 22)“They Fight” (Hulu Original) – Premiere

July 18“Theme Song Takeover” (Season 6)“NWSL: Gotham FC vs. Seattle Reign” (ABC, ESPN Deportes)

July 19“WNBA: Los Angeles Sparks vs. Dallas Wings” (ABC)“Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA Countdown” (ESPN)“Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA: Connecticut Sun vs. Phoenix Mercury” (ESPN)

July 20“King of the Hill” (Season 15) (Hulu Original) – Premiere

July 21“Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro”

July 22“BeddyByes”“King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original)“X-Men ’97” (Season 2) (Disney+ Original)

July 23“Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston” – Premiere“PGA TOUR: 3M Open Day 1” (ESPN+)“Banana Ball: Party Animals vs. Clowns” (ESPN)

July 24“Project Runway” (Season 22)“Soy Luna: Let’s Roll Again” (Disney+ Original) – Premiere“PGA TOUR: 3M Open Day 2” (ESPN+)“NFL Flag Championships” (ESPN, ESPN2, ESPN Deportes, ABC, NFL+)“WNBA Countdown” (ESPN)“Banana Ball: Bananas vs. Firefighters” (ESPN2)“Kia WNBA Shooting Stars and State Farm WNBA 3-Point Contest”(ESPN)

July 25“How Not to Draw: Shorts” (Season 5)“Locker Diaries: Descendants: Shorts”“Theme Song Takeover” (Season 6)“PGA TOUR: 3M Open Day 3”(ESPN+)“NFL Flag Championships” (ESPN, ESPN2, ESPN Deportes, ABC, NFL+)“Banana Ball: Bananas vs. Firefighters” (ESPN2)“WNBA Countdown” (ABC)“WNBA All-Star Game” (ABC)“WNBA Postgame” (ABC)

July 26“PGA TOUR: 3M Open Day 4” (ESPN+)“NFL Flag Championships” (ESPN, ESPN2, ESPN Deportes, ABC, NFL+) –“Banana Ball: Bananas vs. Firefighters” (ESPN2)“Women’s Sports Sundays – NWSL: Angel City FC vs. Racing Louisville” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)

July 27“Furious” (Hulu Original) – Three-Episode Premiere

July 28“Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro”“WNBA: Indiana Fever vs. Seattle Storm” (ESPN)

July 29“King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original)“X-Men ’97”(Season 2) (Disney+ Original)

July 30“Disney Jr. Play Break: Shorts” (Season 1)“House of Stassi”(Freeform) – Premiere“Lollapalooza Livestream Day 1”“PGA TOUR: Rocket Classic Day 1” (ESPN+)

July 31“Adults” – Special Premiere“Lollapalooza Livestream Day 2”“Project Runway” (Season 22)“PGA TOUR: Rocket Classic Day 2” (ESPN+)“Banana Ball: Tailgaters vs. Party Animals” (ESPN2)
content_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

Disney+將在七月迎來一系列精彩的首播、回歸熱門節目及重大現場體育賽事。

七月的開端將以“迪士尼慶祝美國”(Disney Celebrates America)為主題，這是一個為紀念獨立日而舉辦的24小時特別節目。ESPN的轉播將提前開始，包括溫布頓網球賽以及本月稍後的WNBA比賽。

在娛樂方面，Disney+和Hulu將推出新片和回歸作品，亮點包括“成人”(Adults)第二季、Lollapalooza的直播以及“與星共舞：下一位專業舞者”(Dancing With the Stars: The Next Pro)可供串流播放。

以下是Disney+七月的完整節目安排，您可以在這裡註冊Disney+帳戶。

七月一日 “被遺棄的”(Abandoned) (Hulu Original) – 首播 “King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original) “魔法露營者”(Magicampers) (第一季) “X戰警 ’97”(X-Men ’97) (第二季) (Disney+ Original) – 三集首播 “溫布頓第二輪”(Wimbledon Second Round) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “溫布頓比賽點”(Wimbledon Match Point) (ESPN) “女子大學世界系列冠軍賽第一場”(Women’s College World Series Championship Game 1) (ESPN)

七月二日 “不死不幸：冬季篇”(Undead Unluck: Winter Arc) (Hulu Original) – 特別首播 “PGA巡迴賽：約翰·迪爾經典賽第一天”(PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 1) (ESPN+) “溫布頓第二輪”(Wimbledon Second Round) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “溫布頓比賽點”(Wimbledon Match Point) (ESPN)

七月三日 “迪士尼慶祝美國”(Disney Celebrates America) (ABC News Live) – 24小時節目開始 “辛普森一家：辛普斯利”(The Simpsons: Simpsley) – Disney+獨家集 “PGA巡迴賽：約翰·迪爾經典賽第二天”(PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 2) (ESPN+) “溫布頓第三輪”(Wimbledon Third Round) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “溫布頓比賽點”(Wimbledon Match Point) (ESPN)

七月四日 “迪士尼慶祝美國”(Disney Celebrates America) (ABC News Live) “PGA巡迴賽：約翰·迪爾經典賽第三天”(PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 3) (ESPN+) “溫布頓第三輪”(Wimbledon Third Round) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “內森著名熱狗吃比賽 – 女子組”(Nathan’s Famous Hot Dog Eating Contest – Women’s) (ESPN+) “內森著名熱狗吃比賽 – 男子組”(Nathan’s Famous Hot Dog Eating Contest – Men’s) (ESPN2) “溫布頓比賽點”(Wimbledon Match Point) (ESPN)

七月五日 “奇比宇宙”(Chibiverse) (第四季) “鯊魚節”(SHARKFEST) – 年度夏季活動的新首播 “與伯蒂·格雷戈里親密接觸的鋸鯊”(Hammerhead Sharks Up Close with Bertie Gregory) “世界上最大的馬科鯊”(World’s Biggest Mako) “武士鯊的攻擊”(Attack of the Samurai Sharks) “鯊魚對巨型鱷魚”(Shark vs. Giant Croc) “鯊魚島對決”(Shark Island Showdown) “鯊魚：礁石對手”(Sharks: Reef Rivals) “大白鯊挑戰賽”(Great White Gauntlet) “PGA巡迴賽：約翰·迪爾經典賽第四天”(PGA TOUR: John Deere Classic Day 4) (ESPN+) “溫布頓16強賽”(Wimbledon Round of 16) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “NWSL：波士頓傳承對灣區FC”(NWSL: Boston Legacy vs. Bay FC) (ESPN) “溫布頓16強賽”(Wimbledon Round of 16) (ABC) “女子體育星期日 – WNBA倒數”(Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA Countdown) (ESPN) “女子體育星期日 – WNBA：印第安納狂熱對拉斯維加斯王牌”(Women’s Sports Sundays – WNBA: Indiana Fever vs. Las Vegas Aces) (ESPN)

七月六日 “邊緣醫生”(Doctor on the Edge) (Hulu Original) “溫布頓16強賽第一場及外場”(Wimbledon Round of 16 No. 1 Court & Outer Courts) (ESPN2, ESPN Deportes) “溫布頓16強賽中心場”(Wimbledon Round of 16 Centre Court) (ESPN)

七月七日 “邊緣醫生”(Doctor on the Edge) (Hulu Original) – 季終集 “溫布頓四分之一決賽中心場”(Wimbledon Quarterfinals Centre Court) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “溫布頓四分之一決賽第一場”(Wimbledon Quarterfinals No. 1 Court) (ESPN2) “WNBA：達拉斯翼對紐約自由”(WNBA: Dallas Wings vs. New York Liberty) (ESPN)

七月八日 “藍色小狗合輯”(Bluey Compilations) – 首播 “King & Prince: Our Meet-Up in LA” (Disney+ Original) “X戰警 ’97”(X-Men ’97) (第二季) (Disney+ Original) “溫布頓四分之一決賽中心場”(Wimbledon Quarterfinals Centre Court) (ESPN, ESPN Deportes) “溫布頓四分之一決賽第一場”(Wimbledon Quarterfinals No. 1 Court) (ESPN2)

七月九日  
“PGA巡迴賽：創世紀蘇格蘭公開賽第一天” (ESPN+)  
“溫布頓早餐” (ESPN)

“溫布頓混合雙打冠軍賽” (ESPN)  

七月十日

“溫布頓男子單打半決賽” (ESPN, ESPN Deportes)  

七月十一日

“PGA巡迴賽：創世紀蘇格蘭公開賽第三天” (ESPN+)

七月十二日  
“PGA巡迴賽：創世紀蘇格蘭公開賽第四天” (ESPN+)

七月十七日

summary_zh:
由阿魯希·雅各(Arushi Jacob)報導

Disney+將在七月迎來一系列精彩的首播、回歸熱門節目及重大現場體育賽事。

七月的開端將以“迪士尼慶祝美國”(Disney Celebrates America)為主題，這是一個為紀念獨立日而舉辦的24小時特別節目。ESPN的轉播將提前開始，包括溫布頓網球賽以及本月稍後的WNBA比賽。
